SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa

Interface QueryMechanism

All Known Implementing Classes:
BasicJdbcMechanism
public interface QueryMechanism
The query mechanism interface.

Application uses third-party drivers to connect to and query a database using different mechanism. Some of them are, odbc, http protocol, jdbc, etc. JPA-LITE supports connection over jdbc type 4 driver, where post obtaining a connection, Statement, PreparedStatement, and CallableStatement objects are used for executing any SQL statement. Often one has to specify the query parameters and/or bind variables while executing a statement. This interface exposes the API to facilitate the same.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt, int bindIndex, Class<?> datatype, Object bind)
    Api to prepare a PreparedStatement by adding appropriate bind variables.
    void
    prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt, int bindIndex, EntityAttribute attribute, Object bind)
    Api to prepare a PreparedStatement by adding appropriate bind variables.

  • Method Details

    • prepare

      void prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt, int bindIndex, EntityAttribute attribute, Object bind) throws SQLException
      Api to prepare a PreparedStatement by adding appropriate bind variables. PreparedStatement interface in JDBC API represents the precompiled statement and one can create a precompiled statement by passing the query with bind variables to the prepareStatement() method of the Connection interface, or use question mark(?). If using pre-compiled statement, then the question mark placeholder needs to be substitued with appropriate value.
      Parameters:
      pStmt - Sql Prepared Statement object
      bindIndex - Index of the parameter name in the statement buffer.
      attribute - Field definition of a db column.
      bind - Value of the column to be set.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • prepare

      void prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt, int bindIndex, Class<?> datatype, Object bind) throws SQLException
      Api to prepare a PreparedStatement by adding appropriate bind variables. PreparedStatement interface in JDBC API represents the precompiled statement and one can create a precompiled statement by passing the query with bind variables to the prepareStatement() method of the Connection interface, or use question mark(?). If using pre-compiled statement, then the question mark placeholder needs to be substitued with appropriate value.
      Parameters:
      pStmt - Sql Prepared Statement object
      bindIndex - Index of the parameter name in the statement buffer.
      datatype - Data type of the column
      bind - Value of the column to be set.
      Throws:
      SQLException
